summary: Tested football field dimension fix. Fixed a syntax error in KickoffWorkflowDialog.jsx (missing closing div tag). All field components now correctly use 8.33% end zone width (10 yards / 120 yards). Visual testing confirmed field displays correctly in Advanced Mode with proper end zones, yard lines, and ball positioning.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in KickoffWorkflowDialog.jsx - missing closing tag for the playing field area container
All 6 field components now use correct 8.33% end zone width: FootballField.jsx, FieldViewDialog.jsx, PuntFieldView.jsx, FieldGoalFieldView.jsx, KickoffWorkflowDialog.jsx, SimpleFootballLiveGame.jsx
END_ZONE_PERCENT = (10 / 120) * 100 = 8.33% is correctly calculated in all components
5-yard line is correctly positioned inside the playing field (at 5% of the playing field area, not in the end zone)
Yard line markers (10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90) are correctly positioned within the playing field area
context_for_next_testing_agent: Football field dimension fix verified. All field components use correct 8.33% end zone width. The KickoffWorkflowDialog.jsx had a syntax error (missing closing div) which was fixed. Demo football game accessible at /demo/football with Simple Mode and Advanced Mode options.

details.5_yard_line: Inside playing field, not in end zone

details.advanced_mode: KickoffFieldView in KickoffWorkflowDialog shows correct dimensions

details.issue: Missing closing tag for playing field area container

screenshots_taken: football_advanced_mode.png - Advanced Mode with field visualization
football_kickoff_field.png - Advanced Mode kickoff dialog with field view

field_appearance.end_zones: Visible on both sides with team colors
field_appearance.goal_lines: White lines at edge of end zones

mocked_data.note: Demo mode uses local state, no backend API calls for game data
